title: Device Settings - All settings can be changed
scenario: Verify all non-toggle settings in Device Settings can be changed and display updated values correctly
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the phone and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, tap the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. Tap any non-toggle option (e.g., Language, Sidetone, or other list-based setting).
4. Verify that a picker (list of available values) displays.
5. Select a new value from the picker.
6. Confirm that the picker closes and the option now displays the newly selected value.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for every non-toggle option available for the device.
8. After changing all options, verify that all updated values are displayed correctly on the Device Settings screen.
expected: All non-toggle settings can be changed. Tapping a non-toggle option opens a picker with all available values. Selecting a value closes the picker and updates the option display. All changes persist and display correctly on the Device Settings screen.
